title: Fix typedef derived from type defined inside interface (#3441)

features.name: typedef interface member type access
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration that references a type defined inside an interface instance using dotted path notation (iface_path.typedef_name)
features.snippet:
interface x_if(); typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] data; } rq_t; endinterface
module top(); x_if if0(); typedef if0.rq_t my_rq_t; my_rq_t rq; endmodule

features.name: typedef interface member type with same name
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration that references a type defined inside an interface instance and uses the same name as the original typedef (typedef iface_path.same_name same_name;)
features.snippet:
interface x_if(); typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] data; } rq_t; endinterface
module top(); x_if if0(); typedef if0.rq_t rq_t; rq_t rq; endmodule

features.name: typedef nested interface member type access
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration that references a type defined inside a nested interface structure using multi-level dotted path (outer_iface.inner_iface.typedef_name)
features.snippet:
interface x_if(); typedef struct packed { logic [15:0] addr; } rq_t; endinterface
interface z_if(); x_if x_if0(); endinterface
module top(); z_if if0(); typedef if0.x_if0.rq_t rq_t; rq_t rq; endmodule

features.name: typedef interface member type with arrayed instance in path
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration that references a type defined inside an interface, where the path includes an arrayed interface instance (iface.arrayed_inst[idx].typedef_name)
features.snippet:
interface x_if(); typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] data; } rq_t; endinterface
interface y_if(); x_if x_if_a[2](); endinterface
module top(); y_if y_if0(); typedef y_if0.x_if_a[0].rq_t rq_t; rq_t rq; endmodule

features.name: chained typedef from interface member type
features.description: Code should include chained typedef declarations where each typedef references either an interface member type or a previously defined typedef alias (typedef iface.path.typename alias1; typedef alias1 alias2;)
features.snippet:
interface x_if(); typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] addr; } rq_t; endinterface
module top(); x_if if0(); typedef if0.rq_t my_rq_t; typedef my_rq_t my_rq2_t; my_rq2_t rq; endmodule
